alerts.title: ₹48,762 spent at Croma in 3 transactions
alerts.description: Croma is your top merchant this month with ₹48,762.28 across just 3 transactions, making it the single largest merchant spend. Evaluate whether all purchases were planned or if any can be returned or deferred.

alerts.title: INOX detected as a recurring monthly subscription
alerts.description: INOX is being flagged as a monthly subscription at ₹3,694.19, which is unusual for a cinema chain — this may indicate an auto-renewing membership or pass. Verify if this membership is delivering value given you also spent ₹4,636.37 at BookMyShow this month.

alerts.title: Dual pharmacy spend: Apollo (₹10,974) + MedPlus (₹5,040) this month
alerts.description: You spent ₹10,974.38 at Apollo Pharmacy across 10 transactions and ₹5,040.78 at MedPlus across 6 transactions — a combined ₹16,015.16 on pharmacies. Consolidating to a single pharmacy could unlock loyalty discounts and reduce impulse purchases.

alerts.title: Health & Fitness spend up 7.9% and trending above 3-month average
alerts.description: Health & Fitness rose to ₹20,989.98 this month from a 3-month average of ₹18,165.54, a ₹2,824 overage. With Cult.fit already at ₹4,974.82 for the month, confirm there are no overlapping gym or fitness memberships driving the excess.

tips: You made 7 ATM withdrawals totalling ₹47,000 this month — averaging ₹6,714 per withdrawal. Shifting recurring payments like groceries (Blinkit: ₹4,971) and food (Swiggy: ₹7,538) to UPI/card will reduce untraceable cash spend and help you account for where this money goes.

Your combined Amazon (₹35,592 / 10 txns) and Flipkart (₹18,207 / 6 txns) spend is ₹53,800 this month. Batch your orders to qualify for larger discounts and avoid impulse buys — 16 transactions across two platforms suggests frequent unplanned purchases.

You are paying ₹1,699/month each for both LinkedIn Premium and ChatGPT Plus (₹3,398 combined). Review your actual usage of LinkedIn Premium — if you are not actively job-searching or generating leads, pausing it saves ₹20,388 annually.

Swiggy shows 15 transactions at ₹7,538 this month while you also hold a Zomato subscription costing ₹4,395/month. You are paying a premium subscription on one platform while ordering frequently on a competing one — consider consolidating all food delivery to Zomato to extract value from the subscription you are already paying for.

Shopping at ₹1,35,546 remains your largest category despite dropping 34.8% from last month's ₹2,07,957. Your 3-month average is ₹1,57,054 — set a monthly shopping cap of ₹1,00,000 and use a single platform (Amazon or Flipkart) to avoid duplicate purchases across Myntra (₹8,420) and Meesho (₹5,573) as well.
